'''Steve Collins''' (born 9 April 1974) is an Australian former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played at club level for [[Canberra Raiders]], [[Parramatta Eels]], [[Featherstone Rovers]], [[Gateshead Thunder (1999)|Gateshead Thunder]] and [[Hull FC]] during 2000s [[Super League V]], as a {{rlp|fb|wg}}, or {{rlp|ce}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/><ref name="Stats → Past Players → C at hullfc.com">{{cite web|url=http://www.hullfc.com/past-players/C|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130612025300/http://hullfc.com/past-players/C|url-status=dead|archive-date=12 June 2013|title=Stats → Past Players → C at hullfc.com|publisher=hullfc.com|date=31 December 2017|accessdate=1 January 2018}}</ref>

==Playing career==

===First Division Grand Final appearances===
Collins played {{rlp|fb}}, and scored a [[Try (rugby)|try]] in [[Featherstone Rovers]]' 22–24 defeat by [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the 1998 [[Rugby Football League Championship Second Division|First Division]] Grand Final at [[Kirklees Stadium|McAlpine Stadium]], [[Huddersfield]] on 26 September 1998.<ref name="First Division Grand Final - 1998 - A Night To Remember!">{{cite web|url=http://www.btinternet.com/~Rovers/gpgg11.htm|title=First Division Grand Final – 1998 – A Night To Remember!|publisher=Great Players – Great Games|date=31 December 2011|accessdate=1 January 2012|url-status=dead|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20080725210743/http://www.btinternet.com/~rovers/gpgg11.htm|archivedate=25 July 2008|df=dmy-all}}</ref>

===Club career===
Collins was transferred from [[Parramatta Eels]] to [[Featherstone Rovers]], signed by [[Steve Simms]], Steve Collins made his début for [[Featherstone Rovers]] on Sunday 1 February 1998, and he played his last match for Featherstone Rovers during the 1998 season.<ref>{{cite web |title=Collins, Steve |url=https://www.fevarchive.co.uk/players/steve-collins/227/ |website=fevarchive.co.uk |access-date=24 October 2024}}</ref>
